ocr_uncertainty: MinerU OCR has malformed accents and some hat notation around equations (11), (12), and discussion text.
The Appendix mentioned by the paper was not available as a local normalization file.
The optimal-policy equations and welfare derivation should be checked against the original PDF or appendix before review status improves.
